evidence: valueTypeName emits unit return type; validateAbiValueType rejects Unit parameters and validateValueType rejects stored Unit; Tests/PsyDiagnostics.lean covers Unit parameter rejection.
valueTypeName, literal, predicates, assertions, ExpressionPredicateProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, and BoolStorageArrayProbe cover Bool values plus Bool scalar/array storage.
valueTypeName, literal, casts, U32ArithmeticProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, U32StorageScalarProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover U32 values.
valueTypeName lowers U64 to Felt; Counter, ArithmeticProbe, ArrayProbe, and storage fixtures cover Felt values.
valueTypeName, literal hash4, HashProbe, HashStorageProbe, MapProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover Hash values.

valueTypeName, array literal/index lowering, and fixed-array equality are covered by ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe.
structDecl, struct literals, field access, ABI structs, and storage structs are covered by StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and StorageNestedAggregateProbe.
valueTypeName and validateAbiValueType accept Address as a scalar Felt-backed type; validateValueType accepts Address in storage. Pattern match exhaustiveness verified across Psy backend.
validateAbiValueType rejects Bytes with an explicit diagnostic; Psy IR v0 does not support dynamic bytes types. Pattern match exhaustiveness verified.
validateAbiValueType rejects String with an explicit diagnostic; Psy IR v0 does not support dynamic string types. Pattern match exhaustiveness verified.
Psy IR v0 lowers U8 as a Felt-backed scalar (same as U32); valueTypeName returns "U8", literal emits toString value; U8 ABI parameters accepted by validateAbiValueType.
Psy IR v0 rejects U128; valueTypeName returns error "Psy IR v0 does not support U128"; validateValueType and validateAbiValueType reject U128.
stateDecl and scalar storage effects are covered by Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, HashStorageProbe, U32StorageScalarProbe, and StorageNestedAggregateProbe.
validateState accepts only Map<Hash, Hash, N>; MapProbe covers the supported shape and Tests/PsyDiagnostics.lean covers unsupported map shapes.
stateDecl and storage-array effects are covered by ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, StructArrayProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe.
literal emits Nu32 and is covered by U32ArithmeticProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, U32StorageScalarProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe.
literal emits Felt numerals and is covered by Counter, ArithmeticProbe, ArrayProbe, and storage fixtures.
literal emits true/false and is covered by AssertProbe, ExpressionPredicateProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, and BoolStorageArrayProbe.
literal emits Hash four-limb arrays and is covered by HashProbe, HashStorageProbe, and MapProbe.
literal emits Address as a Felt-backed value; Psy backend accepts Address in ABI parameters and validateAbiValueType. Pattern match exhaustiveness verified in Psy/IR.lean.
literal emits toString value for U8 literals; Psy backend accepts U8 in ABI parameters.
Psy IR v0 does not support U128 literals; literal function returns placeholder toString value.
contextFunction lowers to get_user_id and ContextProbe covers it.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects userIdHash with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
contextFunction lowers to get_contract_id and ContextProbe covers it.
contextFunction lowers to get_checkpoint_id and ContextProbe covers it.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects timestamp with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects epochHeight with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects chainId with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects gasPrice with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects gasLeft with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects baseFee with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects prevRandao with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects randomSeed with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects origin with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects coinbase with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
Psy IR v0 context read catch-all rejects blockHash with an explicit diagnostic; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId are available.
assignOpSymbol lowers to += and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to + for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; U32ArithmeticProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to -= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to - for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; U32ArithmeticProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to *= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to * for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; U32ArithmeticProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to /= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to / for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; U32ArithmeticProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to %= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to % for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; U32ArithmeticProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to &= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to & for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; BitwiseProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to |= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to | for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; BitwiseProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to ^= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to ^ for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; BitwiseProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to <<= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to << for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; BitwiseProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
assignOpSymbol lowers to >>= and assignOpBinarySymbol lowers to >> for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; BitwiseProbe and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerExpr delegates to literal; all fixtures use literal expressions.
lowerExpr emits local names; most fixtures use local bindings.
lowerExpr emits fixed array literals; ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover them.
lowerExpr emits fixed array indexing; ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, StructArrayProbe, NestedAggregateProbe, and U32HashPackingProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits new Struct literals; StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits field access; StructProbe, StructArrayProbe, AbiAggregateProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits addition; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits subtraction with operand parenthesization; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits multiplication; ArithmeticProbe and U32ArithmeticProbe cover it.
lowerExpr emits division; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits modulo; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits exponentiation; U32ArithmeticProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise and; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise or; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits bitwise xor; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits shift-left; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits shift-right; BitwiseProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits casts after ensureCastType validation; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, U32HashPackingProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover casts.
lowerExpr emits equality; ExpressionPredicateProbe, AssertProbe, and ArrayProbe cover scalar and fixed-array equality.
lowerExpr emits inequality; ExpressionPredicateProbe and ArrayProbe cover scalar and fixed-array inequality.
lowerExpr emits less-than; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits less-or-equal; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits greater-than; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits greater-or-equal; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean and; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean or; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits boolean not; ExpressionPredicateProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits dynamic Hash construction; U32HashPackingProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits hash intrinsic; HashProbe covers it.
lowerExpr emits hash_two_to_one intrinsic; HashProbe covers it.
lowerExpr delegates to lowerEffectExpr, which validates expression-only effects and rejects statement-only effects; effect fixtures and diagnostics cover the split.
lowerEffectExpr emits scalar .get(); Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, HashStorageProbe, U32StorageScalarProbe, and diagnostics cover expression/statement use.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar assignment; Counter, ConditionalProbe, StructProbe, BoolStorageScalarProbe, HashStorageProbe, U32StorageScalarProbe, and diagnostics cover expression misuse.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar compound assignment; U32StorageScalarProbe and StorageNestedAggregateProbe cover supported use and diagnostics cover expression misuse/type mismatch.
lowerEffectExpr emits Map.contains; MapProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits Map.get; MapProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr and lowerEffectStmt emit Map.insert; MapProbe covers expression insert.
lowerEffectExpr and lowerEffectStmt emit Map.set; MapProbe covers expression set return values and statement set.
lowerEffectExpr emits array .get(), with U32 casts when needed; ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerEffectStmt emits array assignment, with U32 casts when needed; ArrayProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerEffectExpr emits storage struct-array field .get(); StructArrayProbe covers it.
lowerEffectStmt emits storage struct-array field assignment; StructArrayProbe covers it.
lowerEffectExpr emits scalar storage struct field .get(); StructProbe covers it.
lowerEffectStmt emits scalar storage struct field assignment; StructProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathRead emits generic scalar, array, and map storage paths; MapProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.

lowerStoragePathWrite emits generic scalar, array, and map storage path writes, with Felt writeback only for Felt-backed U32 storage arrays; MapProbe, BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.

lowerStoragePathAssignOp emits supported scalar/array storage compound assignment, uses native Psy assignment for U32 struct paths, rewrites Felt-backed U32 storage-array paths as read/update/write casts, and rejects map value compound assignment; StorageNestedAggregateProbe, U32StorageArrayProbe, and diagnostics cover the boundary.
Psy IR v0 rejects storage.dynamic.array.push with an explicit diagnostic because DPN does not expose dynamic array storage semantics.
Psy IR v0 rejects storage.dynamic.array.pop with an explicit diagnostic because DPN does not expose dynamic array storage semantics.
Psy IR v0 rejects memory.array.set with an explicit diagnostic because memory arrays are not lowered.
Psy IR v0 rejects memory.array.new with an explicit diagnostic because memory arrays are not lowered.
Psy IR v0 rejects memory.array.length with an explicit diagnostic because memory arrays are not lowered.
Psy IR v0 rejects memory.array.get with an explicit diagnostic because memory arrays are not lowered.
lowerEffectExpr emits context functions; ContextProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathSegment emits field access; StorageNestedAggregateProbe covers it.
lowerStoragePathSegment emits index access; BoolStorageArrayProbe, HashStorageProbe, StorageNestedAggregateProbe, and U32StorageArrayProbe cover it.
lowerStoragePathRead/lowerStoragePathWrite handle mapKey at the map boundary; MapProbe covers it.
lowerStatement emits immutable let; most fixtures cover it.
lowerStatement emits mutable let; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits assignment to local, array index, or field path; U32ArithmeticProbe, BitwiseProbe, and NestedAggregateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits compound assignment; U32ArithmeticProbe and BitwiseProbe cover it.
lowerStatement delegates to lowerEffectStmt, which rejects expression-only effects; storage fixtures and diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement emits assert; AssertProbe and ExpressionPredicateProbe cover it.
lowerStatement emits assert_eq; AssertProbe, ArrayProbe fixed-array equality, and most executable fixtures cover it.
lowerStatement emits Psy if/else statement; ConditionalProbe covers it.
lowerStatement emits static Psy for loop; LoopProbe covers it.
Psy IR v0 rejects unbounded while loops with an explicit diagnostic; DPN proof backends require statically bounded iteration. Use boundedFor instead.
Psy IR v0 rejects release statements with an explicit diagnostic; release is currently only lowered by EmitWat allocator-aware paths.
lowerStatement emits return and validateEntrypointBodies requires non-Unit returns to end with return; all returning fixtures and diagnostics cover it.
lowerStatement emits abort("message"); for revert with message and abort("revertWithError"); for revertWithError.
lowerStatement emits abort("revertWithError"); for structured error reverts.
inferExprType types nativeValue as U64; Psy IR v0 explicitly rejects native value inspection with a clear diagnostic.
lowerExpr emits __invoke_sync#<Felt>(target, methodId, [args]); CrosscallProbe covers it and Dargo compilation accepts the generated source.
Psy IR v0 rejects typed scalar crosscalls with an explicit diagnostic instead of silently lowering them to Felt-returning __invoke_sync calls.
Psy IR v0 rejects value-bearing typed scalar crosscalls with an explicit diagnostic because the current Psy lowering only models untyped Felt-returning __invoke_sync calls.
Psy IR v0 rejects static typed scalar crosscalls with an explicit diagnostic because the current Psy lowering only models untyped Felt-returning __invoke_sync calls.
Psy IR v0 rejects delegate typed scalar crosscalls with an explicit diagnostic because the current Psy lowering only models untyped Felt-returning __invoke_sync calls.
Psy IR v0 rejects EVM contract creation with an explicit diagnostic because DPN does not expose EVM create semantics.
Psy IR v0 rejects EVM deterministic contract creation with an explicit diagnostic because DPN does not expose EVM create2 semantics.
Psy IR v0 rejects compile-time ABI-packed CALL (EVM ERC20/protocol helper); not a DPN primitive.
Psy IR v0 rejects EVM ecrecover precompile Expr; circuit crypto uses host-specific gadgets, not ECDSA recovery.
Psy IR v0 rejects EIP-712 permit digest Expr (EVM ERC20Permit path).
Psy IR v0 rejects NEAR string-pool promise creation with the explicit "NEAR promise API is not supported by Psy IR v0" diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects NEAR promise chaining with the explicit "NEAR promise API is not supported by Psy IR v0" diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects NEAR callback promise-result count reads with the explicit "NEAR promise API is not supported by Psy IR v0" diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects NEAR callback promise-result status reads with the explicit "NEAR promise API is not supported by Psy IR v0" diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects NEAR callback promise-result U64 reads with the explicit "NEAR promise API is not supported by Psy IR v0" diagnostic.
lowerEffectStmt emits __emit([fields]) with an event-name comment; EventProbe covers it and Dargo test confirms result_events contains the emitted data.
Psy IR v0 rejects indexed events with an explicit diagnostic instead of lowering and silently dropping indexed-topic semantics.
Psy IR v0 rejects checkErc721Received (EVM-only IERC721Receiver callback; PF-P2-02) with an explicit diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects checkErc1155Received (EVM-only IERC1155Receiver callback; PF-P2-02) with an explicit diagnostic.
Psy IR v0 rejects dynamic arrays with explicit diagnostics in validateAbiValueType, validateValueType, and valueTypeName; ValueType.array is recognized but not lowered.
Psy IR v0 rejects storage.dynamicArray in validateState with an explicit diagnostic; StateKind.dynamicArray is recognized but not lowered.
